title: Washington State Senate Passes HB 1409 on Clean Fuel Standard
content: On April 15, Washington State Legislature passed HB 1409 on the Clean Fuel Standard. The Act steepens the carbon intensity requirements for transportation fuels under the Clean Fuels Program (CFP). It further removes violations of CFP from civil and criminal penalty statutes in the Washington Clean Air Act and instead, establishes CFP-specific enforcement and penalties.
author: Aru Somya
